title: acer oblongum var. angustum
intro: Acer oblongum var. angustum, also known as the narrowleaf maple, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the maple tree species. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acer oblongum var. angustum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the bark and leaves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal remedy.
